output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?teamLabel ?mascotLabel WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P118 wd:Q1215884 .
  ?team wdt:P3137 ?mascot .
  ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
  ?mascot rdfs:label ?mascotLabel .
  FILTER(?team != wd:Q324523)
  FILTER(LANG(?teamLabel) = 'en' && LANG(?mascotLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER regex(?mascotLabel , 'Rowdy|Pat Patriot|Captain Fear' , 'i')
}
LIMIT 10
